ddls:
CREATE TABLE "coffee_machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coffee machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the coffee machine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the coffee machine */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the coffee machine */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the coffee machine */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the machine (e.g., operational, maintenance, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., coin sensor, coffee request button) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, malfunctioning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the system mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system mode */,
  "default_mode" INTEGER /* Indicates if this mode is the default mode */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if this mode is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coffee_machine_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output event */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee machine that generated the output */,
  "output_value" INTEGER /* Value of the coffee machine output */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the output event */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of output (e.g., coffee, hot water) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the output */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cups, liters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffee_machine_outputs_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES coffee_machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_timers" (
  "timer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timer event */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee machine that generated the timer event */,
  "timer_value" INTEGER /* Value of the request timer */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the timer event */,
  "timer_type" TEXT /* Type of timer (e.g., brewing, cooling) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the timer in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_timers_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES coffee_machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that generated the reading */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee machine that the sensor is attached to */,
  "reading_value" INTEGER /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sensor reading */,
  "reading_type" TEXT /* Type of reading (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., degrees Celsius, PSI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES coffee_machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_mode_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system mode history entry */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee machine that the mode is for */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system mode */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the system mode change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the mode */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the mode change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_mode_history_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES system_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_mode_history_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES coffee_machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the machine */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee machine that was accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, mode change) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES coffee_machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee machine that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the maintenance event */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance in minutes */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES coffee_machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log entry */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee machine that generated the error */,
  "error_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the error event */,
  "error_description" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the error */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the error is resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES coffee_machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
